title: Promotion Request
description: Package 6. A typed request to promote a generated draft artifact into a review-ready artifact. A promotion_request does not itself perform promotion; it is the input consumed by a promotion script. The first promoter in the pipeline is scripts/promote_draft_stub.py, which accepts a concept_packet draft under generated/drafts/ plus its generation manifest, verifies both source hashes, and writes a review artifact plus a promotion record under generated/review/. No AI, no network, no release: review artifacts remain non-authoritative until a later pipeline stage that does not exist yet.

target_path.description: Repo-relative directory where the review artifact and promotion record will be written. Must live under generated/review/.
